# Limited Energy eXperts (LEX)

> Independent consulting for AI-enabled design and smart automation by Shawn C. Tovey, RCDD. Practical AI adoption for low-voltage design, home automation, and design workflow productivity.

## About

Limited Energy eXperts (LEX) is an independent consulting practice operated by Shawn C. Tovey, RCDD (Registered Communications Distribution Designer — credentialed by BICSI). LEX focuses on practical AI adoption for engineering and home automation workflows — helping turn repetitive technical work into structured, repeatable processes through AI-assisted estimating, documentation, coordination, and system planning. Shawn also builds free tools for the Division 27/28 community, including PLEX (power load sizing) and The Estimator (job costing).

**Owner:** Shawn C. Tovey, RCDD
**Credential:** Registered Communications Distribution Designer (RCDD) — BICSI
**Contact:** stovey@limitedenergy.net
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/mctovey/
**GitHub:** https://github.com/LimitedEnergyX
**Website:** https://limitedenergy.net

## Pages

- [Home](https://limitedenergy.net/): Professional profile and overview of LEX services, credentials, and tools.
- [PLEX — Power Load EXaminer](https://limitedenergy.net/plex): Free web-based load sizing tool for telecom rooms and equipment rooms. Calculates UPS, generator, PoE, and cooling loads for Division 27/28 coordination. Version 2.71. No login required, runs entirely in the browser.
- [Smart Home Design](https://limitedenergy.net/home-automation): Local-first smart home system design and programming. No cloud subscriptions, no vendor lock-in. Engineered for practical, long-term reliability.
- [About](https://limitedenergy.net/about): Professional profile for Shawn C. Tovey, RCDD. Background, BICSI credential detail, and links to free tools.
- [The Estimator](https://limitedenergy.net/estimate): Free web-based job estimation tool for Division 27/28 low-voltage work. Schedule-driven crew sizing, BICSI-coded scope, federal/California overtime math, local/remote cost variants. Version 1.25. No login required, runs entirely in the browser.

## Key Facts

- Shawn C. Tovey holds the RCDD credential from BICSI — a professional certification for communications infrastructure design.
- LEX specializes in Division 27 (Communications Systems) and Division 28 (Electronic Safety and Security) per MasterFormat/CSI.
- PLEX is a free, client-side design calculator for preliminary sizing of telecom and equipment room power, cooling, UPS, and generator loads.
- The Estimator is a free, client-side job estimation tool for Division 27/28 low-voltage work, with schedule-driven crew sizing, BICSI-coded scope, and overtime math.
- LEX builds custom AI tooling and automation to improve design workflow efficiency.
- All site content is authored by Shawn C. Tovey, RCDD.

## What LEX Does Not Do

- General IT support or managed services
- Residential electrical work (licensed electrician scope)
- Network administration
